title: SERVICE AGREEMENT - THIRD-PARTY SOFTWARE SUPPORT
notes:
1. Current Context & Status  
As of today, the SERVICE AGREEMENT - THIRD-PARTY SOFTWARE SUPPORT (contractId: CON-20260330-D9LUUZ-M6CB) is in Draft status between SKM LLC (SKM Life Sciences & Technology) and TechSolve Arabia LLC. The contract is valued at a net amount of 480,000 plus a VAT amount of 72,000 (total 552,000), effective from 2026-03-15 until 2027-03-31. It is currently pending approval from Finance and assigned to SKM.

2. Operational Impact  
This service contract represents a financial commitment of 552,000 for the specified term. The review is due by 2026-04-04, and its Medium risk level indicates the need for thorough assessment. As the renewal window opens much later (2028-03-31 to 2029-03-31), there is no imminent need for renewal actions; however, pending Finance approval could delay onboarding and support service readiness.

3. Next Steps — Business Ops & C-Level  
a) Business Operations: Ensure Finance completes its approval process before the review due date of 2026-04-04 to maintain contract execution timelines and avoid operational delays.  
b) C-Level / Board: It is advisable for senior leadership to review the Medium risk profile and the sizable financial exposure (total 552,000) before final sign-off, ensuring alignment with group risk appetite and existing provisioning.
